factors.rationale: The products are visible but compete with text and other elements.
The products are shown without a clear use case or context.
The image communicates a sale but lacks a specific buyer benefit.
The layout has competing elements and weak spacing.
The products are clear, but material quality is not emphasized.
The brand and promotional details provide a credible trust signal.
The text and elements have strong contrast and are legible.
The image has clear campaign intent with promotional text.
